<?php /** * This file has been @generated by a phing task by {@link GeneratePhonePrefixData}. * See [README.md](README.md#generating-data) for more information. * * Pull requests changing data in these files will not be accepted. See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 3822 => 'Danilovgad/Kolasin/Podgorica', 38230 => 'Bar/Ulcinj', 38231 => 'Herceg Novi', 38232 => 'Kotor/Tivat', 38233 => 'Budva', 38240 => 'Niksic/Pluzine/Savnik', 38241 => 'Cetinje', 38250 => 'Bijelo Polje/Mojkovac', 38251 => 'Andrijevica/Berane/Blue/Gusinje/Petnitsa/Rožaje', 38252 => 'Pljevlja/Zabljak', ];
